description: The doctor --json output contract. Each component's doctor emits a top-level ok boolean; agent-suite aggregates into a SuiteReport. Honest health: absent is a named state, not silence; unknown is never smoothed into ok. Shared-service components (Plan 004 WI-1.6) are checked by endpoint when not installed locally.

ok.description: Top-level health boolean; false => component is broken

degraded.description: True when ok but in a non-fatal degrade mode

memory_provider.description: Memory provider health when agent-notes is installed and memory_provider_checks is True (Plan 012 WI-2.1)

codex_health.description: Codex plugin probe health (ok) and minimum required-plugin readiness (ready); individual plugin states remain visible

invariants: A component that is not installed is 'absent' (named state, not failure for optional tier)
A component that is installed but unreachable or reports ok:false is 'failed'

A shared-service component (locality=shared_service) not installed locally is checked by endpoint: 'remote' when healthy, 'failed' when endpoint is down, 'not_configured' when no endpoint is set (Plan 004 WI-1.6)
All components absent or not_configured => suite_ok is false (do not smooth an empty box into healthy)
verify_restore parses JSON even when regista replay exits non-zero (drift detection exits 1)
Lock drift matches is null (not false) when no lock file exists
Codex probe success (ok) is distinct from the selected required plugin set being ready
